title: Investors’ Wealth Increases by N262.82 Billion as Market Capitalization Hits N56.91 Trillion - FinancialEDGE
description: The Nigerian Equities market rebounded today, with the NGX All-Share Index surging 47 basis points to close at 100,503.21 points, up from 100,032.32 points in the previous session. The upswing was fueled by strong investor interest in stocks like OANDO, AIRTELAFRI, CUSTODIAN, ACCESSCORP, and 20 others. As a result, the year-to-date return jumped to 34.41%,
html:
The Nigerian Equities market rebounded today, with the NGX All-Share Index surging 47 basis points to close at 100,503.21 points, up from 100,032.32 points in the previous session.

The upswing was fueled by strong investor interest in stocks like OANDO, AIRTELAFRI, CUSTODIAN, ACCESSCORP, and 20 others.

As a result, the year-to-date return jumped to 34.41%, and the market capitalization increased by N262.82 billion to N56.91 trillion.

Although market activity slowed down, with volume and value traded decreasing by 64.27% and 17.30%, respectively.
